step_dist.zigzag_source: Sierra Chart Zig Zag Line Length (abs, HL-based, 5.25 pt reversal)
step_dist.update_frequency: On each completed RTH zigzag swing (09:30-16:00)
step_dist.note: Computed from ALL RTH bars, not just the 10:00-16:00 trading window

add_dist.note: AddDist < StepDist decoupled — transfers ticks from loss to profit on adds

seed_dist.note: Decoupled from StepDist. Initial value; coupled to StepDist (P90) after first seed.

session.note: 10:00 start skips Open block (NPF=0.83, 29.6% cap-walk rate)

speedread_filter.note: 50-tick rolling avg of SpeedRead composite. Both seed and reversal filtered.

stop_4c.note: Flatten position when cap-walk count within cycle exceeds 2. Full state reset: new watch price at flatten price, wait for fresh SeedDist move. Counter resets per cycle (seed, reversal, or flatten).
stop_4c.validation: 0% recovery rate on stopped cycles in P1 counterfactual — pure tail-risk insurance with no false positives.
stop_4c.p1_effect: NPF 1.200 -> 1.172, worst day -2,210 -> -1,556 (29.6% improvement), 99 cycles stopped (5.3%)

stop_4a.status: NOT USED — killed in Task 2 sweep
stop_4a.reason: 50-60% of stopped cycles eventually recovered in P1 counterfactual. Stops destroyed the strategy (NPF < 0.89 at all sigma levels). The rotation mechanism inherently requires absorbing large adverse excursions.

rolling_computations_for_cpp.note: TWO separate rolling computations, different studies, different windows.

computation_1_zigzag_regime.input: Completed RTH zigzag leg distances (abs, from Sierra Chart Zig Zag study)

study_3_autotrader: [8] SeedDist = 15.0 (initial, coupled to StepDist after first seed)

p2a.status: FAIL — regime compression, gross edge near zero

p2b.status: PASS — gross PF P1-like, P2a was regime dip
